title: Synthetic volume availability hypothesis
rationale: Synthetic volume availability can document a research premise before any implementation work is considered.
expected_mechanism: The proposed mechanism is that synthetic volume changes would only be evaluated after declared timestamp availability rules.
falsification_criteria: Reject the record if future leakage checks find that any required input is unavailable at the declared decision time.
Block the record if future diagnostics cannot separate the proposed mechanism from a simple synthetic null control.
risks: Synthetic fixtures may be too small to represent later research constraints.
Timestamp assumptions may be incomplete when future governance objects add stricter checks.
author: codex-fixture
